def negative_python_perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_pool_not_reused():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_resource_pooling_http_pool_not_reused"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Resource pooling. Flag HTTP connection pools that are recreated rather than shared per upstream."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
